name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC Workflow in a Plugin: 26 agents across 6 phases (planning, design, development, testing, deployment, operations), 43 knowledge skills, 14 orchestrator commands. Industry-standard SDLC best practices embedded in every agent.

code-review-graph.name: code-review-graph
code-review-graph.description: Visual code review analysis with dependency graphs and change impact assessment

highlights: 43 knowledge skills: 13 core SDLC, 30 advanced methodology skills (incident mgmt, perf, a11y, observability, release, tech debt, org health, etc.)
6 new agents: Engineering Manager, Tech Lead, Release Manager, Technical Writer, Performance Engineer, Accessibility Engineer
6-phase SDLC covering planning, design, development, testing, deployment, operations
Ready-to-use templates: RFC, design docs, ADRs, postmortems, SLOs, incident reports, performance benchmarks, accessibility audits
Code quality enforcement: linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA, CI/CD gates
Integrated code-review-graph for visual dependency analysis and change impact
